channel.title: Quality3Ds Daily Pulse
channel.description: Curated daily news for 3D printing enthusiasts.

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #100 - 2026-04-17
item.description:
📰 Pete Pharma and Fagron form exclusive North American distribution deal for pharmaceutical 3D printing US-based pharmaceutical innovator Pete Pharma has formed a distribution and commercialization partnership with Fagron Inc., a global pharmaceutical compounding firm, to extend the reach of pharmaceutical 3D printing... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 16, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/1775593118797-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/pete-pharma-and-fagron-form-exclusive-north-american-distribution-deal-for-pharmaceutical-3d-printing

📰 TCT and SME Celebrate Additive Manufacturing Achievement at Awards Gala First combined event recognises innovators and leaders in additive manufacturing. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 16, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/TrinityWheelerPhotography-8725_cropped.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/tct-and-sme-celebrate-additive-manufacturing-achievement-at-awards-gala

📰 AMGTA report outlines how AM’s true resource efficiency can be evaluated The Additive Manufacturer Green Trade Association (AMGTA) has released its latest report, entitled Additive Manufacturing in Resource-Efficient Manufacturing Systems. The resource, presented at the organization’s 2026 Annual Member Summit this past Monday, … The post AMGTA report outlines how AM’s true resource efficiency can be evaluated appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart... Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/amgta-logo-1-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/amgta-report-outlines-how-ams-true-resource-efficiency-can-be-evaluated

🏠 Azure Printed Homes opens 25,000 sq. ft. Denver facility to expand 3D printed housing Azure Printed Homes, a California-based 3D printed housing solutions provider, has opened a 25,000 sq. manufacturing facility in Denver, reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 16, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Azure-Printed-Homes-Denver-facility-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/azure-printed-homes-opens-25000-sq-ft-denver-facility-to-expand-3d-printed-housing

🖨 AmPd Labs publishes first third-party validated mechanical data for binder jetted MAR-M 247LC superalloy AmPd Labs released a white paper presenting room-temperature tensile, impact, and microstructural data for MAR-M 247LC nickel-base superalloy produced via metal binder jetting, marking the first publicly available... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 16, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/ampd-hq720-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/ampd-labs-publishes-first-third-party-validated-mechanical-data-for-binder-jetted-mar-m-247lc-superalloy

🚀 America Makes and NCDMM Launch $14.5M Defense AM Qualification Push America Makes and the National Center for Defense Manufacturing and Machining (NCDMM) have unveiled two new project calls totaling $14.5 million, both backed by the Office of the Under Secretary of Defense... The funding targets a persistent bottleneck in defense additive manufacturing: qualification, the rigorous, often slow process of certifying…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Apr 16, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/videoStill-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/america-makes-and-ncdmm-launch-14-5m-defense-am-qualification-push-250570

🖨 EOS Takes Full Ownership of Metal Powder Specialist Metalpine Industrial 3D printing firm EOS has completed the acquisition of Austrian metal powder manufacturer Metalpine GmbH, moving from partial shareholder to sole owner after a multi-year investment relationship. The deal deepens EOS’s strategic commitment to materials, with particular emphasis on titanium, a segment where customer demand continues to outpace supply chain capacity, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Apr 16, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Metalalpine-43-Quad-150x100.webp Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/eos-takes-full-ownership-of-metal-powder-specialist-metalpine-250591

🏠 Eurobearings Integrates Meltio’s Wire Laser Technology to Cut Bearing Production Lead Times by Up to 50% Heavy industry runs on rotating equipment, turbines, cement mills, rolling machinery, and when those systems stop, the financial impact is immediate. Bearings are the components that keep them turning, and for nearly three decades Italian manufacturer Eurobearings has been building them for original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) across energy, oil and gas,, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Apr 16, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Eurobearings-18-2048x1639-1-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/eurobearings-integrates-meltios-wire-laser-technology-to-cut-bearing-production-lead-times-by-up-to-50-250575

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #99 - 2026-04-16
item.description:
🔥 Euler releases real-time build viewer for metal additive manufacturing operators Euler, an Icelandic software startup focused on AI-driven defect detection in 3D printing, has released Euler Viewer, a free real-time build viewer for metal additive manufacturing operators, which the company … The... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 15, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Euler-Viewer-02-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/euler-releases-real-time-build-viewer-for-metal-additive-manufacturing-operators

🖨 A closer look at HP's new Multi Jet Fusion 1200 3D printer "We always had the idea that we wanted to make that technology more affordable to the masses with democratising to a broader customer base." Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 15, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/09cc8099-93d4-491f-82a3-573107093c73.jpeg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/a-closer-look-at-hps-new-multi-jet-fusion-1200-3d-printer

🚀 Authentise launches AI platform that captures & acts on engineering intent The launch of the software comes as Authentise picked up the TCT Software Award. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 15, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/Whisper-Compliance-Dashboard-Screenshot.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/authentise-launches-ai-platform-to-capture-act-on-engineering-intent

🚀 Nikon AM Synergy awarded JAMA IV DLA IDIQ contract for metal AM pilot parts program Nikon Advanced Manufacturing’s engineering and manufacturing services unit, Nikon AM Synergy, was awarded the JAMA IV IDIQ Pilot Parts Program contract by the Defense Logistics Agency (DLA), the U.S. logistics … The post Nikon AM Synergy awarded JAMA IV DLA IDIQ contract for metal AM pilot parts program appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/nikon-am-synergy-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/nikon-am-synergy-awarded-jama-iv-dla-idiq-contract-for-metal-am-pilot-parts-program

🖨 Loughborough University Targets the UK’s Critical Materials Sovereignty Gap Tungsten, niobium, and tantalum, the metals that will define the next generation of energy and defence technology, share a common challenge: they are notoriously difficult to process and largely sourced from... As the UK moves to reduce its dependence on foreign supply chains for strategic materials, Loughborough University is tackling both problems…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Apr 15, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Professor-Moataz-Attallah-left-and-Mohamed-Said-service-technician-at-Freemelt-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/loughborough-university-targets-the-uks-critical-materials-sovereignty-gap-250494

🚀 3D Printing Industry Preparing Website Upgrade Following Reader Feedback 3D Printing Industry is preparing a significant upgrade to its website, with a redesigned platform set to launch in the coming weeks. The update follows our earlier reader survey, which gathered feedback on how audiences use the site and where improvements are most needed, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Apr 15, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/State-of-Investment-Series-10-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/3d-printing-industry-preparing-website-upgrade-following-reader-feedback-250539

📰 DEEP Manufacturing prints WAAM marine propeller blade in NAB DEEP Manufacturing Ltd has completed the printing of a Nickel Aluminum Bronze (NAB) marine propeller blade as part of the Digitally Enabled Efficient Propeller (D.E.E.P.) project, a consortium effort backed … The... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 15, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/DEEP-WAAM-propellor-blade-05-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/deep-manufacturing-prints-waam-marine-propeller-blade-in-nab

🚀 AtomForm introduces Palette 300 multi-material 3D printer with 12-nozzle system and 36-color capability AtomForm, a MOVA Group consumer and professional 3D printing hardware company, has introduced the Palette 300, an FDM 3D printer designed to enable multi-color and multi-material printing through a 12-nozzle... 3DPI travelled to the launch event in San Jose to learn more about how the system targets reduced material waste and simplified workflows, with…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Apr 15, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/image-8-150x100.jpeg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/atomform-introduces-palette-300-multi-material-3d-printer-with-12-nozzle-system-and-36-color-capability-250438

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #98 - 2026-04-15
item.description:
🔥 Cadillac’s Formula 1 Fight and 3D Printing Goulding and Leah Nabangi reveal Cadillac's strategy to obtain Formula 1 approval while still dominating the luxury vehicle market, thanks to 3D printing. The post Cadillac’s Formula 1 Fight and 3D Printing appeared on Fabbaloo. Read more ? https://www.fabbaloo.com/news/cadillacs-formula-1-fight-and-3d-printing

♻️ Microgravity System Recycles SLA Resin And Enables Casting A new research paper describes a closed-loop installation to recycle SLA resin and support injection casting in microgravity. The post Microgravity System Recycles SLA Resin And Enables Casting appeared on Fabbaloo. Read more ? https://www.fabbaloo.com/news/microgravity-system-recycles-sla-resin-and-enables-casting

🏠 Stratasys unveils new PolyJet printer, plus new materials & software capabilities The announcements were made ahead of RAPID + TCT. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 14, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/IMG_J850_Core_perspective_close_big_0326a_1.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/stratasys-unveils-new-polyjet-printer-plus-new-materials-software-capabilities

🚀 DyeMansion to launch compact Powershot post-processing system DyeMansion hopes to showcase the new solution at this year's Formnext. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 14, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/DyeMansion_Compact_Powershot_Web_1920x1080.jpg.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/dyemansion-to-launch-compact-powershot-post-processing-system

🖨 Axtra3D marks five years as a production-focused additive manufacturing company Axtra3D, a developer of Hi-Speed stereolithography (SLA) 3D printing systems, is marking its fifth anniversary at this year’s RAPID + TCT event. The company, co-founded by Gianni Zitelli and Praveen … The post Axtra3D marks five years as a production-focused additive manufacturing company appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/Axtra3D-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/axtra3d-marks-five-years-as-a-production-focused-additive-manufacturing-company

🚀 HP launches HP Multi Jet Fusion 1200 compact MJF system At Rapid + TCT 2026 in Boston, HP is unveiling a series of developments across its additive manufacturing portfolio, covering the new HP Multi Jet Fusion 1200 compact printer, productivity … The post HP launches HP... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 14, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/HP-1200-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/hp-launches-hp-multi-jet-fusion-1200-compact-mjf-system

🖨 HP announces new 3D printer, productivity boosts and more at RAPID + TCT “By lowering cost per part and simplifying workflows, we are making it easier for customers to adopt additive manufacturing and scale it across new applications.” Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 14, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/HP-MJF-1200-3D-Printer-Solution_-Enviro-Image_16.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/hp-announces-new-3d-printer-productivity-boosts-and-more-at-rapid-tct

📰 The top-rated NFL helmet in 2026 is 3D printed The results of the 2026 NFL helmet laboratory tests have been released and 3D printing is at the top. The annual tests, conducted in collaboration with the NFL Players Association, … The post The top-rated NFL helmet in 2026 is 3D printed appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/carbon-riddell-1-150x150.jpeg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/the-top-rated-nfl-helmet-in-2026-is-3d-printed

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #97 - 2026-04-14
item.description:
🦺 Ohio State researchers find 3D printed surgical models significantly improve tumor removal rates in head and neck cancer Researchers at The Ohio State University Comprehensive Cancer Center – James Cancer Hospital and Solove Research Institute (OSUCCC – James) have used patient-specific 3D printed anatomical models to significantly... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 13, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/OSU-cancer-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/ohio-state-researchers-find-3d-printed-surgical-models-significantly-improve-tumor-removal-rates-in-head-and-neck-cancer

📰 #244 TCT Hall of Fame: Joe Allison on a life in 3D printing From parts maker to the movies. Reported by TCT Magazine on Apr 13, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/04/Additive-Insight-Re-Design.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/podcasts/244-tct-hall-of-fame-joe-allison-on-a-life-in-3d-printing

💻 Designer Anika Greyling’s 3D prints embrace irregularity Anika Greyling is part of a growing cohort of young designers that are using 3D printing as a medium for art and design objects. A graduate of the Design Academy … The post Designer Anika Greyling’s 3D prints embrace irregularity appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/anika_greyling-1-150x150.jpeg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/designer-anika-greylings-3d-prints-embrace-irregularity

🚀 L3Harris uses additive manufacturing to cut satellite thruster lead times by up to 12 months L3Harris Technologies has been shifting production of in-space satellite thrusters from conventional machining to additive manufacturing in a bid to reduce delivery times for US national security space programs. Thrusters … The post L3Harris uses additive manufacturing to cut satellite thruster lead times by up to 12 months appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/L3Harris-02-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/l3harris-uses-additive-manufacturing-to-cut-satellite-thruster-lead-times-by-up-to-12-months

📰 Sherpa Design combines Carbon DLS printing and CNC machining for MBARI underwater vehicle component The Monterey Bay Aquarium Research Institute (MBARI) has made significant progress in refining the integration of a unique biological sampling system in an autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV). MBARI required a … The post Sherpa Design combines Carbon DLS printing and CNC machining for MBARI underwater vehicle component appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Sherpa-Design-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/sherpa-design-combines-carbon-dls-printing-and-cnc-machining-for-mbari-underwater-vehicle-component

💻 Our Industry’s Shipping Container Moment The additive manufacturing industry likes to think of itself as disruptive, fast-moving, and future-oriented. In many ways, that is true, reported by 3DPrint.com on Apr 13, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/325135/our-industrys-shipping-container-moment

📰 Beehive Gets $29.7 Million Contract The US military is pivoting from a world where it fields a few exquisite craft to one where it can manufacture swarms of vehicles. Additive manufacturing at scale, along with, reported by 3DPrint.com on Apr 13, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/325122/beehive-gets-29-7-million-contract

📰 How Decibel Landed the Brands Everyone Wants The first thing Adam Hecht will tell you is that 3D printing already has the technology. The harder part has been finding applications people actually want, reported by 3DPrint.com on Apr 13, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/325079/how-decibel-landed-the-brands-everyone-wants

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #96 - 2026-04-13
item.description:
🖨 The Snapmaker U1 is here and it’s something else Snapmaker is very excited about the new U1 and rightly so. According to Chikai Eto’s report for TCT Asia, the U1 was the most-funded 3D printer on Kickstarter, raising $20.61 million, reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 12, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/SnapmakerU1_IMG_2754-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/the-snapmaker-u1-is-here-and-its-something-else

📰 IMDEA Materials study maps crystallization behaviour in LPBF-processed Finemet alloys Researchers at IMDEA Materials have published a study examining how crystallization occurs in Finemet alloys produced via laser powder bed fusion (LPBF), offering new insight into how process parameters shape … The... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 12, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/IMDEA-Finemet-alloys-02-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/imdea-materials-study-maps-crystallization-behaviour-in-lpbf-processed-finemet-alloys

🚀 Bambu Lab is launching a new 3D printer on April 14th Bambu Lab is set to reveal its next flagship desktop 3D printer series on April 14, 2026, with its teaser page featuring the tagline “Xcellence made simple” and a confirmed … The post Bambu Lab is launching a new 3D... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 12, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/new-new-bambu-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/bambu-lab-is-launching-a-new-3d-printer-on-april-14th

🏠 Serendix and JR West build Japan’s first 3D printed railway station overnight Japanese construction technology firm Serendix completed what it described as the world’s first 3D printed railway station, replacing a wooden shelter that had stood at Hatsushima Station in Arida, Wakayama … The... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 12, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/ABB-IRB-6700-robot-arm-150x150.jpeg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/serendix-and-jr-west-build-japans-first-3d-printed-railway-station-overnight

🚀 Harvard Engineering Students 3D Print VTOL Drone to Improve Marine Biology Research With all the current focus on the boom in drones used for national security, it’s easy to forget that the civilian drone market is growing, too. In addition to the, reported by 3DPrint.com on Apr 12, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/325127/harvard-engineering-students-3d-print-vtol-drone-to-improve-marine-biology-research

📰 5 Useful Travel Gadgets You Can Actually 3D Print - bgr.com 5 Useful Travel Gadgets You Can Actually 3D Print bgr.com Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Apr 12, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMia0FVX3lxTE1aU09INUR1MWxmZUQwODlOaU1ieU1HbzN3MTJpUUlZdmE3V2tnbnR1MkFuVW5LcV9fS0FxVUFQWmtrWEtuRVR4d0FfUkwwYkJwczN5WUc2Q0VhRkdYUmdPRHA3OFZ0bXVmQ2NJ?oc=5

Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikAFBVV95cUxQX045NV9rcVdlV0ZaeGZ3WXZlRkpDWDBSNjRBUS1wSFhldWlvX3dmd1hWV0RYc1pqVjBYY3VBVGV1c2M3azAxUUUtR3ZxdW16bHRLRjQwZUM3YUVzcDk5bFREMFVIeE05SjhWc01fc1VDTmZPV3JTUTNNX1paNVJST2ZXa0N4eXVlRk54YkI2MlU?oc=5

Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikgFBVV95cUxQRFNGMFQtZFdZMlFja1liMDhrS2ZEOHp2T0E3ZkR2MFNGekVBTVRjS2E4OVZvRzZvVk5FcFZXTDh4N0hIUGwtUVNodkNzeU1maW9sSFAyQmVaZTY2a295VUs0eFR4cjM4OFVFRk56ckFZVnE2d1M5aE1qVml5SC00SzJtbWNRajlyNWFOMEhRZXJBQQ?oc=5

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #95 - 2026-04-12
item.description:
🖨 Purple Platypus confirmed as national reseller for Formlabs 3D printing systems Purple Platypus, a California-based additive manufacturing distributor founded in 2007, has taken on a national reseller agreement with Formlabs, adding the company’s full range of stereolithography (SLA) and... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 11, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Purple-Platypus-Formlabs-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/purple-platypus-confirmed-as-national-reseller-for-formlabs-3d-printing-systems

📰 Orano and UNC Charlotte study additive manufacturing for nuclear transport cask impact limiters Orano Federal Services and the University of North Carolina at Charlotte have completed an updated investigation into using additive manufacturing to produce impact limiters for transportation casks used to ship …... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 11, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Orano-transport-casks-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/orano-and-unc-charlotte-study-additive-manufacturing-for-nuclear-transport-cask-impact-limiters

📰 Skyphos Technologies introduces additive lithography platform for microneedle fabrication Skyphos Technologies, a Blacksburg, Virginia–based advanced manufacturing company, has introduced a fabrication platform it calls “additive lithography” — a volumetric approach to producing microscale structures for... Reported by VoxelMatters on Apr 11, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Untitled1-e1775843608210-150x150.webp Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/skyphos-technologies-introduces-additive-lithography-platform-for-microneedle-fabrication

💻 This Week in Security: Flatpak Fixes, Android Malware, and SCADA was IOT Before IOT was Cool Rowhammer attacks have been around since 2014, and mitigations are in place in most modern systems, but the team at gddr6.fail has found ways to apply the attack to current-generation GPUs. Reported by Hackaday 3D Printing on Apr 10, 2026. Image ? https://hackaday.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/01/darkarts.jpg Read more ? https://hackaday.com/2026/04/10/this-week-in-security-flatpak-fixes-android-malware-and-scada-was-iot-before-iot-was-cool

🏠 Benelli Looks to 3D Printing for Gun Chassis There’s a lot happening in the world of 3D printing guns. There is the ever-present danger of some people trying to print guns at home, reported by 3DPrint.com on Apr 10, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/325111/benelli-looks-to-3d-printing-for-gun-chassis

📰 ExOne + voxeljet Are Trying to Do the One Thing Customers Need Right Now: Keep Machines Running, and Rebuild Confidence For years, ExOne and voxeljet were two of the best-known names in binder jet 3D printing, especially in sand printing for foundries. But in recent years, ExOne “got buried” inside, reported by 3DPrint.com on Apr 10, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/323562/exone-voxeljet-are-trying-to-do-the-one-thing-customers-need-right-now-keep-machines-running-and-rebuild-confidence

🚀 Was the Artemis II Toilet 3D-Printed in Titanium? What We Really Know The Artemis II mission launched on April 1, carrying four astronauts on the first crewed flight around the Moon in more than half a century. On board was the Universal Waste Management System (UWMS), the first functional toilet to travel…, reported by 3D Natives on Apr 10, 2026. Image ? https://www.3dnatives.com/en/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/artemis-toilet-cover.jpg Read more ? https://www.3dnatives.com/en/artemis-ii-toilet-10042026

💻 CNC Kitchen Vibe-Coded a Texture Tool, then Gave It Away for Free Stefan Hermann, the creator behind the popular CNC Kitchen YouTube channel, wanted a better way to add custom textures to his 3D models. Although fluent in CAD, he found Blender,, reported by 3DPrint.com on Apr 10, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/325083/cnc-kitchen-vibe-coded-texture-tool-gave-it-away-for-free
